name: Underworld Overseer
short_description: Build your dungeon, command demons, set traps, and slay invading adventurers with powerful spells.
detailed_description:
Become the dungeon master in virtual reality!

Take on the role of a powerful demon tasked with building and managing your own underground lair. Unleash your evil genius by designing complex dungeons, summoning a wide range of demonic servants, placing traps, and casting powerful spells to defend your domain against adventurers who dare to enter.

Build your own dungeon

Command your imps to dig tunnels and build rooms that attract creatures with different needs and abilities, populating your dungeon. Careful planning is essential to keep them productive and satisfied, while protecting your underground fortress.

Place deadly traps

Design dungeons where every corridor becomes a deadly trial thanks to your arsenal of traps, including spikes, poison, and flames. You have many tools at your disposal.

Cast powerful spells

Master devastating spells, such as fireballs or lightning, and summon an army of skeletons to crush your enemies.

Enjoy many levels with a wide variety of challenges

Progress through many levels featuring varied challenges that demand strategy and careful planning to achieve victory.

Are you ready to embrace the darkness and rule your own underground kingdom?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
